scoring_map.formula: EXT-01 (3 pts binary) + EXT-02 (3 pts binary) + EXT-03 (4 pts sum of sub-tests)

scoring_methodology:
EXT — Extensibility (10 pts max)

Scoring Methodology (per phase_E.md v2.4 §1):

  EXT-01 — Hot-reload Add Rule    : 3 pts (binary: pass = 3, fail = 0)
  EXT-02 — Hot-reload Remove Rule  : 3 pts (binary: pass = 3, fail = 0)
  EXT-03 — Caching Correctness     : 4 pts (1 pt per sub-test E01–E04)

  Total Phase E = EXT-01 + EXT-02 + EXT-03 = 10 pts

  EXT-01 and EXT-02 are binary (all-or-nothing) — no partial credit.
  EXT-03 is sum of sub-tests, each sub-test 1 point (binary).

  EXT-03 Sub-Tests:
    E01 — STATIC route cached (HIT)           : 1 pt
    E02 — CRITICAL route NOT cached            : 1 pt
    E03 — STATIC TTL expiry                     : 1 pt
    E04 — Authenticated route NOT cached        : 1 pt

  NOTE: If config format not recognized, EXT-01/EXT-02 are skipped;
  EXT-03 runs normally (does not need config edits).
